description_long: This is a Philips-branded hair dryer with a sleek, modern design, predominantly black with red accents. The main body is cylindrical and tapers toward the handle, which is ergonomically shaped for comfortable grip. The front features a circular nozzle with a removable concentrator attachment, while the rear has a mesh-patterned air intake grill. A long, black power cord extends from the base of the handle, ending in a standard plug. The side of the body displays power ratings and branding in white text. Buttons and switches are located along the handle for easy thumb access during use.
description: A black and red Philips hair dryer with a cylindrical body, ergonomic handle, mesh air intake, and a removable concentrator nozzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular nozzle, concentrator attachment, and the power cord extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the Philips branding, power ratings, ergonomic handle, and the concentrator nozzle placed on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the mesh-patterned air intake grill and the power cord trailing behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth, unbranded side of the body and the concentrator nozzle on the ground.
attribute_nozzle_design: The nozzle is a removable, narrow concentrator type designed to focus airflow for precise styling. It is slightly flared at the end and can be detached from the main body.
attribute_air_intake_grill_pattern: The air intake grill features a circular mesh pattern with evenly spaced small holes.
attribute_handle_orientation: The handle is perpendicular to the main cylindrical body, extending downward for ergonomic grip.
